morning_tea.title: Morning Tea ☕ Soft Lo-Fi for a Peaceful Start
morning_tea.description: Slow morning lo-fi to ease into your day with matcha and gentle piano. Perfect for journaling, light reading, or a calm morning routine.
morning_tea.music_prompt: lo-fi hip hop, soft jazzy piano, organic percussion, 80bpm, fresh morning tea atmosphere, slow living aesthetic, instrumental only, no vocals
morning_tea.image_prompt: A sunlit cozy corner, a cup of matcha tea with steam rising, a small flower vase on a light oak table, gentle morning light streaming through linen curtains, cinematic soft focus, Ghibli watercolor aesthetic, warm pastel palette

night_focus.title: Night Focus 🕯️ Cozy Atelier Lo-Fi for Deep Work
night_focus.description: Late-night lo-fi for deep work and study sessions. Rhodes piano, soft rain, and vinyl crackle to keep you in flow.
night_focus.music_prompt: chill lo-fi beats, minimalist rhodes piano, 75bpm, muffled sound, cozy atelier night ambience, focus music, no vocals, instrumental
night_focus.image_prompt: A warm artist studio at night, dim candlelight, a tea pot and an open book on a wooden desk, rainy window in the background, cozy and serene atmosphere, dark indigo and amber tones, Ghibli aesthetic, painterly brushwork

vintage_cafe.title: Vintage Tea Corner 🎷 1940s Lo-Fi Jazz
vintage_cafe.description: 1940s nostalgic lo-fi jazz. Muted saxophone, double bass, vinyl crackle. For dreamers and old souls.
vintage_cafe.music_prompt: vintage lo-fi jazz, 1940s nostalgic, dusty vinyl crackle, slow and sentimental, 70bpm, warm and grainy texture, muted saxophone, double bass, brushed drums, instrumental
vintage_cafe.image_prompt: A vintage 1940s tea cafe corner, warm sepia tones, a steaming cup on a marble table, gramophone in background, dusty sunlight through lace curtains, vintage film grain aesthetic, art deco accents

sunday_reset.title: Sunday Reset ✨ Lo-Fi to Recharge Your Week
sunday_reset.description: Hopeful sunday lo-fi to reset and recharge. Acoustic guitar, mellow brushes, and a calm rainy window.
sunday_reset.music_prompt: uplifting lo-fi, soft acoustic guitar, mellow brushed drums, 78bpm, sunday morning reset, hopeful warm, instrumental, no vocals
sunday_reset.image_prompt: A peaceful sunday morning bedroom, sunbeams through linen curtains, an open book and a coffee cup on a quilted bed, plants on the windowsill, soft pastel light, Ghibli watercolor style

cozy_evening.title: Cozy Evening 🌙 Lo-Fi for Tea & Quiet Time
cozy_evening.description: Intimate evening lo-fi. Double bass, muted trumpet, brushed snare, fireplace warmth. For tea and quiet thoughts.
cozy_evening.music_prompt: soft lo-fi, double bass, muted trumpet, brushed snare, 72bpm, evening tea ceremony, intimate and warm, instrumental, no vocals
cozy_evening.image_prompt: A cozy evening living room, warm fireplace glow, a steaming teacup on a wool blanket, a sleeping cat curled up beside it, golden hour amber light, Ghibli aesthetic, soft painterly textures
